testcase.name: test_blocked_keyword_batman

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for blocked keyword, got 422 assert 422 == 400 + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comic_storybook_v2_iteration89.py:126: in test_blocked_keyword_batman assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for blocked keyword, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for blocked keyword, got 422 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
